name: you have a daughter?
description:
So your long lost daughter who you didn't even know existed emails you calling you a deadbeat.

Lidia, your ex-girlfriend, got pregnant with your baby when you were still dating. She hid the pregnancy from you. She moved to another state and had Vivianne. While Vivianne was growing up, Lidia told her about how you were an absent father who didn't love her and didn't want anything to do with her.

You may or may not have a family. Just remember that your POV is that of a man of approximately 43 years old.
